strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder of an open-source platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: Title is Senior/Staff, not Principal/Director-level IC
Limited demonstrated AI/ML depth or shipped AI products at scale
Minimal cloud-platform strategy or advisory experience with strategic customers
response.justification: Candidate has the tenure and broad engineering breadth the role requires, plus nascent AI-agent and MCP work and founder experience that signal entrepreneurial drive. However, the role is a Director-level IC focused on AI strategy and advising strategic customers, and the resume shows Senior/Staff-level execution roles with only recent, shallow AI exposure and no evidence of recognized AI products, platforms, or external thought leadership at the scale expected.
